trajectory.description: Starting from scratch. Need to train RL agents on 10 Minigrid environments. Plan: Use PPO from stable-baselines3 with FullyObsWrapper for full grid visibility + custom FlattenWrapper for MLP policy. Train separate models per environment. First iteration: 500K timesteps per env to get baseline score and measure iteration time.

trajectory.description: Observation: MLP-based PPO got 0% success on nearly all environments. Analysis: Flattening the grid destroys spatial information - MLPs can't learn spatial patterns like walls, doors, keys. CNN with proper image processing should dramatically improve results. Also need higher entropy for exploration in sparse-reward environments. Decision: Rewrite with CNN feature extractor, proper image wrapper, higher entropy coefficient, and train 500K timesteps per env.

trajectory.description: Observation: CNN+PPO with FullyObsWrapper got 0% on 9/10 environments (only DistShift1 at 100%). Analysis: The core problem is sparse rewards - PPO can't discover reward signals in complex sequential tasks (keys, doors, etc.). Two key issues: (1) observation values are tiny after /255 normalization (object indices 0-10 become 0-0.04), causing vanishing gradients, and (2) no exploration bonus for sparse rewards. Decision: (1) Use one-hot encoding for (OBJECT,COLOR,STATE) channels → 22 binary channels with proper 0/1 values, (2) Add count-based intrinsic reward using agent (x,y,dir,carrying) state to encourage exploration, (3) Increase entropy coefficient to 0.2, (4) Train 1M timesteps per env since intrinsic reward should enable learning. This addresses both the representation issue and the exploration issue.

trajectory.description: Observation: Previous eval (iter 1) showed 0.2% success rate. Iter 4 trained with CNN+one-hot+intrinsic reward for 1M timesteps/env but no eval was submitted. Need to evaluate current checkpoints to measure progress. Analysis: The improved representation (one-hot encoding) and exploration (intrinsic reward) from iter 4 should have helped, but beta=0.01 may be too weak. Decision: Submit eval on current checkpoints to get baseline, then retrain with much stronger exploration (beta=0.5, higher entropy, reward normalization).

trajectory.description: Observation: Previous best success_rate was 0.006 (0.6%) with partial observations. Analysis: The 7x7x3 partial view is too limited for navigation tasks, especially in large environments like FourRooms (19x19). Full observability via FullyObsWrapper should allow the agent to see the entire grid, making learning much easier. Decision: Rewrite training with FullyObsWrapper + FlattenObsWrapper, PPO with MlpPolicy, 3M timesteps per env, higher entropy (0.05) for exploration. This is the last iteration so maximize training time.
